title: Claude FM 🎵 music for thinking and building
summary: Claude FM is a curated music service designed to support focused work and creative thinking for developers and builders. The music is made and curated by musicians specifically for thinking and building activities.
writeup: This video introduces Claude FM, a curated music service built to support focused work and creative thinking for developers and builders. The tracks are made and curated by musicians specifically for thinking and building activities. The framing positions music as a personal productivity tool aimed at sustaining concentration during development work.
